# Macrotide

> An open-source AI investment companion for Thai index investors. A single
> Next.js process (App Router, React 19, TypeScript) over a local SQLite file
> (Drizzle ORM), with passkey auth (better-auth), an "Advisor" chat built on the
> Vercel AI SDK via OpenRouter, and live market data. Personal-use experiment;
> not investment advice.

This file is a curated map for LLMs and coding agents. Read the linked docs
on demand rather than crawling the whole repo. Paths are relative to the repo
root so they resolve when browsing the source.

## Start here

- [Root README](./README.md): What the project is, tech stack, quick start.
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): Rules for AI agents — DB routing, secrets, the canonical environment-variable table, product copy. Read before changing code.
- [Docs index](./docs/README.md): The L0/L1 map of all documentation, organised by Diátaxis mode.

## Documentation

- [Getting started](./docs/tutorials/getting-started.md): Guided first run — clone, demo, first holding, first chat.
- [Local development](./docs/how-to/local-development.md): Env setup, npm scripts, seeding, tests, pre-commit hook.
- [Import a portfolio](./docs/how-to/import-a-portfolio.md): CSV, image OCR, and manual entry.
- [Architecture](./docs/explanation/architecture.md): System shape, request lifecycle, demo/owner DB routing, where everything lives.
- [Design principles](./docs/explanation/design-principles.md): Secure-by-default, the "Advisor" voice, single-owner → multi-user.
- [Memory feature](./docs/explanation/memory.md): Long-term memory + chat-session lifecycle design.

## Reference

- [Configuration](./docs/reference/configuration.md): How config works; links to the canonical env-var table in AGENTS.md.
- [API routes](./docs/reference/api.md): Catalogue of app/api/* route handlers.
- [Data model](./docs/reference/data-model.md): SQLite tables and relationships.
- [Auth & AI providers](./docs/reference/auth-and-providers.md): Passkeys, OpenRouter, rate limiting.
- [Deploy](./docs/how-to/deploy.md): Single-VM (Caddy/systemd) and tailnet deployment.
- [Security policy](./SECURITY.md): Threat model and vulnerability reporting.

## Optional

- [Roadmap](./ROADMAP.md): Full phase-by-phase status board (large; the authoritative status doc).
- [Memory-systems research](./docs/explanation/research/memory-systems.md): Prior-art survey behind the memory design.
